info.title: IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterruptedSeries ValueSet for Decision Table Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterruptedSeries ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterruptedSeriesVS

ValueSet-IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterrupted.title: IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterruptedSeries ValueSet for Decision Table Schema
ValueSet-IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterrupted.description: JSON Schema for IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterruptedSeries ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

enum: No DTP doses were administered and client's age is more than 1 year-129
First DTP dose from the primary series was administered-123
Second DTP dose from the primary series was administered-123
Third DTP dose from the primary series was administered. The primary DTP series has been completed-224
The primary DTP series has been completed-100
First tetanus and diphtheria booster dose was administered-140
Second tetanus and diphtheria booster dose was administered. Tetanus and diphtheria immunization schedule has been completed-260
The primary DTP series has been completed and client's age is between 1 year and 6 years-154
Pertussis-containing booster dose was administered. Pertussis immunization schedule has been completed-234

ValueSet-IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterrupted.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterruptedSeries ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/immunizations/ValueSet-IMMZD18SDTPDelayedOrInterruptedSeriesVS.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
